forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,60 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: d980
+title: 'Commands: commit entity.add generalization WIP as clean plan baseline'
+---
+## What
+
+The `kanban` branch has uncommitted work-in-progress that generalizes entity creation — started when the user thought this was an `entity.add` bug. The work is structurally sound and orthogonal to the cross-cutting command refactor. Commit it first so every subsequent card starts from a clean base.
+
+### What's in the WIP
+
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/entity/add.rs` (NEW) — `AddEntity` operation with defaults/position/overrides pipeline. 8 unit tests pass.
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/entity/position.rs` (NEW) — shared `resolve_column` / `resolve_ordinal` helpers with `POSITION_COLUMN_FIELD` / `POSITION_ORDINAL_FIELD` constants.
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/mod.rs` — retires `task.add` / `project.add` from `register_commands()`; lowers expected count 65 → 63; adds regression guards `task_add_not_registered_uses_entity_add_instead` / `project_add_not_registered_uses_entity_add_instead`.
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/scope_commands.rs` — extracts `resolve_entity_type_for_moniker()` helper; renames tests `task_add_never_emitted_from_registry` / `task_add_not_emitted_from_entity_schema`.
+- `kanban-app/src/commands.rs` — extracts `build_dynamic_sources()`, `log_scope_inputs()`, `log_scope_result()` logging helpers.
+- `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml` — minor edits (investigate diff before committing to confirm nothing else regressed).
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/task.yaml`, `project.yaml` — minor edits (same caveat).
+- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/grid-view.stale-card-fields.test.tsx` (NEW) — frontend test; confirm it's passing before commit.
+
+### Scope of this card
+
+- Review the full diff (large — use an Explore subagent to slice it if needed).
+- Run the full test suite and confirm green on the WIP.
+- Commit the work as a focused commit or small series of commits (entity.add generalization first, then scope_commands/logging cleanup, then any YAML edits).
+- Leave the git tree clean before card 01KPEM811W5XE6WVHDQVRCZ4B0 starts.
+
+### Files to touch
+
+No code changes in this card — only review + test + commit.
+
+### Subtasks
+
+- [ ] Read the full WIP diff (or delegate to an Explore subagent) and confirm scope matches the summary above.
+- [ ] Run `cargo nextest run` across affected crates — `swissarmyhammer-kanban`, `swissarmyhammer-commands`, `kanban-app` — all green.
+- [ ] Run `bun test` in `kanban-app/ui/` — grid-view stale-card-fields test passes.
+- [ ] Commit in logical chunks: (1) entity.add/position new files + mod.rs registry retirement, (2) scope_commands refactor, (3) logging helpers in kanban-app/src/commands.rs, (4) any YAML micro-edits.
+- [ ] Verify `git status` is clean before handing off to card 01KPEM811W5XE6WVHDQVRCZ4B0.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- [ ] `git status` on the `kanban` branch shows no unstaged / untracked files touching commands, entities, or scope.
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban -p swissarmyhammer-commands` is green.
+- [ ] `register_commands_returns_expected_count` passes at 63.
+- [ ] `task_add_not_registered_uses_entity_add_instead` and `project_add_not_registered_uses_entity_add_instead` both pass.
+- [ ] At least one new entity (project, tag) can be created via `entity.add:<type>` dispatch from the frontend.
+
+## Tests
+
+- [ ] Run command: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban -p swissarmyhammer-commands` — all green.
+- [ ] Manual: start `kanban-app` dev server, click "New Project" and "New Tag" from the command palette, verify entities are created and appear in the list.
+
+## Workflow
+
+- Use `/commit` or the `commit` skill for the actual commits — one focused commit per concern.
+- No `/tdd` here — the code is already written; this is review + commit.
+
+#commands
\ No newline at end of file

changes.value: Commands: commit entity.add generalization WIP as clean plan baseline

## What

The `kanban` branch has uncommitted work-in-progress that generalizes entity creation — started when the user thought this was an `entity.add` bug. The work is structurally sound and orthogonal to the cross-cutting command refactor. Commit it first so every subsequent card starts from a clean base.

### What's in the WIP

- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/entity/add.rs` (NEW) — `AddEntity` operation with defaults/position/overrides pipeline. 8 unit tests pass.
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/entity/position.rs` (NEW) — shared `resolve_column` / `resolve_ordinal` helpers with `POSITION_COLUMN_FIELD` / `POSITION_ORDINAL_FIELD` constants.
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/mod.rs` — retires `task.add` / `project.add` from `register_commands()`; lowers expected count 65 → 63; adds regression guards `task_add_not_registered_uses_entity_add_instead` / `project_add_not_registered_uses_entity_add_instead`.
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/scope_commands.rs` — extracts `resolve_entity_type_for_moniker()` helper; renames tests `task_add_never_emitted_from_registry` / `task_add_not_emitted_from_entity_schema`.
- `kanban-app/src/commands.rs` — extracts `build_dynamic_sources()`, `log_scope_inputs()`, `log_scope_result()` logging helpers.
- `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml` — minor edits (investigate diff before committing to confirm nothing else regressed).
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/task.yaml`, `project.yaml` — minor edits (same caveat).
- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/grid-view.stale-card-fields.test.tsx` (NEW) — frontend test; confirm it's passing before commit.

### Scope of this card

- Review the full diff (large — use an Explore subagent to slice it if needed).
- Run the full test suite and confirm green on the WIP.
- Commit the work as a focused commit or small series of commits (entity.add generalization first, then scope_commands/logging cleanup, then any YAML edits).
- Leave the git tree clean before card 01KPEM811W5XE6WVHDQVRCZ4B0 starts.

### Files to touch

No code changes in this card — only review + test + commit.

### Subtasks

- [ ] Read the full WIP diff (or delegate to an Explore subagent) and confirm scope matches the summary above.
- [ ] Run `cargo nextest run` across affected crates — `swissarmyhammer-kanban`, `swissarmyhammer-commands`, `kanban-app` — all green.
- [ ] Run `bun test` in `kanban-app/ui/` — grid-view stale-card-fields test passes.
- [ ] Commit in logical chunks: (1) entity.add/position new files + mod.rs registry retirement, (2) scope_commands refactor, (3) logging helpers in kanban-app/src/commands.rs, (4) any YAML micro-edits.
- [ ] Verify `git status` is clean before handing off to card 01KPEM811W5XE6WVHDQVRCZ4B0.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `git status` on the `kanban` branch shows no unstaged / untracked files touching commands, entities, or scope.
- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban -p swissarmyhammer-commands` is green.
- [ ] `register_commands_returns_expected_count` passes at 63.
- [ ] `task_add_not_registered_uses_entity_add_instead` and `project_add_not_registered_uses_entity_add_instead` both pass.
- [ ] At least one new entity (project, tag) can be created via `entity.add:<type>` dispatch from the frontend.

## Tests

- [ ] Run command: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban -p swissarmyhammer-commands` — all green.
- [ ] Manual: start `kanban-app` dev server, click "New Project" and "New Tag" from the command palette, verify entities are created and appear in the list.

## Workflow

- Use `/commit` or the `commit` skill for the actual commits — one focused commit per concern.
- No `/tdd` here — the code is already written; this is review + commit.

#commands

 ---
 ## What

-The `kanban` branch has uncommitted work-in-progress that generalizes entity creation — started when the user thought this was an `entity.add` bug. The work is structurally sound and orthogonal to the cross-cutting command refactor. Commit it first so every subsequent card starts from a clean base.
+The `kanban` branch has two streams of uncommitted WIP that must land before the cross-cutting refactor starts:

-### What's in the WIP
+1. **entity.add generalization** (started earlier) — new `AddEntity` op, `position.rs`, retires `task.add` / `project.add`, updates `register_commands()` count 65 → 63.
+2. **SetActiveViewCmd scope-chain rewrite fix** (from completed task 01KPCSY8R3413FB565CBA7PF9Z) — `ui_commands.rs` now rewrites `view:*` monikers in the scope_chain when the active view changes, fixing "New Tag" / "New Project" failing to surface after a view switch. Ships with new tests in `dispatch.rs` and `command_dispatch_integration.rs`.
+
+Both are tested and structurally sound. Commit them as a focused series so every subsequent card starts from a clean tree.

-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/entity/add.rs` (NEW) — `AddEntity` operation with defaults/position/overrides pipeline. 8 unit tests pass.
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/entity/position.rs` (NEW) — shared `resolve_column` / `resolve_ordinal` helpers with `POSITION_COLUMN_FIELD` / `POSITION_ORDINAL_FIELD` constants.
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/mod.rs` — retires `task.add` / `project.add` from `register_commands()`; lowers expected count 65 → 63; adds regression guards `task_add_not_registered_uses_entity_add_instead` / `project_add_not_registered_uses_entity_add_instead`.
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/scope_commands.rs` — extracts `resolve_entity_type_for_moniker()` helper; renames tests `task_add_never_emitted_from_registry` / `task_add_not_emitted_from_entity_schema`.
-- `kanban-app/src/commands.rs` — extracts `build_dynamic_sources()`, `log_scope_inputs()`, `log_scope_result()` logging helpers.
-- `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml` — minor edits (investigate diff before committing to confirm nothing else regressed).
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/task.yaml`, `project.yaml` — minor edits (same caveat).
-- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/grid-view.stale-card-fields.test.tsx` (NEW) — frontend test; confirm it's passing before commit.
+### Uncommitted files in scope
+
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/entity/add.rs` (NEW) — `AddEntity` op with defaults/position/overrides pipeline.
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/entity/position.rs` (NEW) — shared `resolve_column` / `resolve_ordinal` helpers.
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/mod.rs` — retires `task.add` / `project.add`; adds regression guards.
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/ui_commands.rs` — `SetActiveViewCmd::execute` rewrites scope_chain; adds `set_active_view_rewrites_view_moniker_in_scope_chain` and `set_active_view_leaves_scope_chain_alone_when_no_view_moniker`.
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/dispatch.rs` — dispatch-side support for the fix.
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/scope_commands.rs` — extracts `resolve_entity_type_for_moniker()`; debug-level instrumentation in `emit_entity_add`.
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/tests/command_dispatch_integration.rs` — per-entity-type dispatch/emission tests + cross-cutting guard `list_commands_for_scope_emits_entity_add_for_every_grid_view`.
+- `kanban-app/src/commands.rs` — extracts `build_dynamic_sources()`, `log_scope_inputs()`, `log_scope_result()`.
+- `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml`, `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/{task,project}.yaml` — minor edits; review before committing to confirm no regression.
+- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/grid-view.stale-card-fields.test.tsx` (NEW) — frontend test.

 ### Scope of this card

-- Review the full diff (large — use an Explore subagent to slice it if needed).
-- Run the full test suite and confirm green on the WIP.
-- Commit the work as a focused commit or small series of commits (entity.add generalization first, then scope_commands/logging cleanup, then any YAML edits).

+- Run all affected test suites green.
+- Commit as a focused series — preserve logical boundaries.
 - Leave the git tree clean before card 01KPEM811W5XE6WVHDQVRCZ4B0 starts.

-### Files to touch
-
-No code changes in this card — only review + test + commit.
-
 ### Subtasks

-- [ ] Read the full WIP diff (or delegate to an Explore subagent) and confirm scope matches the summary above.
-- [ ] Run `cargo nextest run` across affected crates — `swissarmyhammer-kanban`, `swissarmyhammer-commands`, `kanban-app` — all green.
-- [ ] Run `bun test` in `kanban-app/ui/` — grid-view stale-card-fields test passes.
-- [ ] Commit in logical chunks: (1) entity.add/position new files + mod.rs registry retirement, (2) scope_commands refactor, (3) logging helpers in kanban-app/src/commands.rs, (4) any YAML micro-edits.
-- [ ] Verify `git status` is clean before handing off to card 01KPEM811W5XE6WVHDQVRCZ4B0.

+- [ ] `npx vitest run` in `kanban-app/ui/` — all green (per acceptance: 1183/1183).
+- [ ] `cargo clippy -p swissarmyhammer-kanban -- -D warnings` — clean.
+- [ ] Commit in logical chunks: (1) entity/add + position + mod.rs registry retirement, (2) SetActiveViewCmd fix + its tests, (3) scope_commands refactor + logging helpers, (4) any frontend tests / YAML micro-edits.
+- [ ] `git status` clean before handoff.

 ## Acceptance Criteria

-- [ ] `git status` on the `kanban` branch shows no unstaged / untracked files touching commands, entities, or scope.
-- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban -p swissarmyhammer-commands` is green.

+- [ ] `set_active_view_rewrites_view_moniker_in_scope_chain` passes.
+- [ ] Manual (from 01KPCSY8R3413FB565CBA7PF9Z): Tags grid + palette → "New Tag" appears; Projects grid + palette → "New Project" appears.

 ## Tests

-- [ ] Run command: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban -p swissarmyhammer-commands` — all green.
-- [ ] Manual: start `kanban-app` dev server, click "New Project" and "New Tag" from the command palette, verify entities are created and appear in the list.

 ## What

-The `kanban` branch has uncommitted work-in-progress that generalizes entity creation — started when the user thought this was an `entity.add` bug. The work is structurally sound and orthogonal to the cross-cutting command refactor. Commit it first so every subsequent card starts from a clean base.
+The `kanban` branch has two streams of uncommitted WIP that must land before the cross-cutting refactor starts:

-### What's in the WIP
+1. **entity.add generalization** (started earlier) — new `AddEntity` op, `position.rs`, retires `task.add` / `project.add`, updates `register_commands()` count 65 → 63.
+2. **SetActiveViewCmd scope-chain rewrite fix** (from completed task 01KPCSY8R3413FB565CBA7PF9Z) — `ui_commands.rs` now rewrites `view:*` monikers in the scope_chain when the active view changes, fixing "New Tag" / "New Project" failing to surface after a view switch. Ships with new tests in `dispatch.rs` and `command_dispatch_integration.rs`.
+
+Both are tested and structurally sound. Commit them as a focused series so every subsequent card starts from a clean tree.

-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/entity/add.rs` (NEW) — `AddEntity` operation with defaults/position/overrides pipeline. 8 unit tests pass.
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/entity/position.rs` (NEW) — shared `resolve_column` / `resolve_ordinal` helpers with `POSITION_COLUMN_FIELD` / `POSITION_ORDINAL_FIELD` constants.
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/mod.rs` — retires `task.add` / `project.add` from `register_commands()`; lowers expected count 65 → 63; adds regression guards `task_add_not_registered_uses_entity_add_instead` / `project_add_not_registered_uses_entity_add_instead`.
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/scope_commands.rs` — extracts `resolve_entity_type_for_moniker()` helper; renames tests `task_add_never_emitted_from_registry` / `task_add_not_emitted_from_entity_schema`.
-- `kanban-app/src/commands.rs` — extracts `build_dynamic_sources()`, `log_scope_inputs()`, `log_scope_result()` logging helpers.
-- `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml` — minor edits (investigate diff before committing to confirm nothing else regressed).
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/task.yaml`, `project.yaml` — minor edits (same caveat).
-- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/grid-view.stale-card-fields.test.tsx` (NEW) — frontend test; confirm it's passing before commit.
+### Uncommitted files in scope

+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/entity/add.rs` (NEW) — `AddEntity` op with defaults/position/overrides pipeline.

+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/ui_commands.rs` — `SetActiveViewCmd::execute` rewrites scope_chain; adds `set_active_view_rewrites_view_moniker_in_scope_chain` and `set_active_view_leaves_scope_chain_alone_when_no_view_moniker`.
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/dispatch.rs` — dispatch-side support for the fix.
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/scope_commands.rs` — extracts `resolve_entity_type_for_moniker()`; debug-level instrumentation in `emit_entity_add`.
+- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/tests/command_dispatch_integration.rs` — per-entity-type dispatch/emission tests + cross-cutting guard `list_commands_for_scope_emits_entity_add_for_every_grid_view`.
+- `kanban-app/src/commands.rs` — extracts `build_dynamic_sources()`, `log_scope_inputs()`, `log_scope_result()`.
+- `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml`, `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/{task,project}.yaml` — minor edits; review before committing to confirm no regression.
+- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/grid-view.stale-card-fields.test.tsx` (NEW) — frontend test.
+
